interface_issues.description: This report is built only from coordinator-generated mock transaction-log candidates because JE Generator produced no real log rows.
interface_issues.upstream_provided: 5 accountant-confirmed mock candidates, 0 deterministic or AI-high-confidence rows.
interface_issues.expected: A fuller transaction log spanning Sections A/B/C.
interface_issues.impact: Section A and Section B are empty, so some report-format paths remain unexercised.

interface_issues.description: Unknown-HST split rows and mock JE lines were included without COA validation.
interface_issues.upstream_provided: Mock JE lines from coordinator scenarios with no COA backing.
interface_issues.expected: Validated transaction-log rows with reliable JE metadata.
interface_issues.impact: The draft report is suitable for workflow testing, not financial reliance.

spec_ambiguities.description: The spec does not make clear whether a dry-run report should still render empty sections when all real transactions are unresolved and only scenario-based coordinator outputs exist.
spec_ambiguities.spec_text: 按 classified_by 分配到 Section A / B / C
spec_ambiguities.interpretation_a: Render empty sections explicitly for traceability.
spec_ambiguities.interpretation_b: Suppress empty sections and show only populated ones.
spec_ambiguities.recommendation: Define whether empty sections are mandatory in dry-run output.

notes: Report draft intentionally keeps empty Section A and B visible to show routing outcomes for this run.
All populated rows come from simulated coordinator resolutions, not from deterministic or AI-high-confidence automation.
